heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Rain showers likely north, scattered in the south; areas of wintry mix, from the Green Mountains eastward, mainly over high terrain. Lows from the upper 20s to mid 30s, except mid 30s to around 40 in the broad valleys west. South and southeast winds around 5 mph east of the Greens, 5 to 15 mph in the west and, gusting to 30 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of wintry mix early along and east of the Greens, otherwise scattered morning showers diminishing, then scattered afternoon showers, mainly from the northern Greens westward. Highs in the low to mid 60s, with some upper 60s in the broad valleys west, and mid to upper 50s northeast. South winds 5 to 10 mph east of the Greens, 5 to 15 mph and gusting to 25 mph in the west, except to 35 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Friday Night
text: Periods of clouds. Scattered showers, mainly before midnight. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40s north, upper 30s to mid 40s in the south. Winds becoming northwest 5 to 15 mph, diminishing late.
